_comment: Audio-only change (issue #83). The CI demo renders a SILENT GIF, so the new sounds are not audible in the posted clip — run the game locally to hear them. Reuses the bundled showcase replay just so the demo job has something to render.
caption: Sound effects: re-sourced all 8 cues from OpenGameArt CC0 submissions, replacing the Kenney set — sword clash, swishes, thwack, trumpet, fanfare (hit, shoot, rout, death, select, order, victory, defeat). NOTE: this GIF is silent, so the change isn't audible here; run locally to hear it. Per-file sources + licences in assets/sfx/CREDITS.md.
